examples: Besides cellulose, there are hemicellulose and lignin.
Its enzymes decompose cellulose and hemicellulose into sugar monomers.
Corn straw consists mainly of cellulose, hemicellulose and lignin, it is a abundant of renewable resource.
An analogy: think of a pencil, where the lead in the middle is the cellulose fiber, surrounded by unwanted lignin and hemicellulose.
